title: Avoid Using Escaped Unicode Characters
description: Escaped Unicode characters should be used sparingly and only for non-printable characters. The use of such characters for printable characters leads to ambiguity and decreases the readability of the code.
recommendation: Review and refactor the code to use actual printable characters instead of their Unicode escape sequences. Unicode escape sequences should be reserved for non-printable characters only.
impact: Using escaped Unicode characters for printable characters can lead to code confusion and potential readability issues, impacting the quality of the code.

checks.message: Review and refactor the code to use actual printable characters instead of their Unicode escape sequences. Unicode escape sequences should be reserved for non-printable characters only.
